task_completion.description: Verify that a new record form for a Resource or HAZMAT Team is open in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is active, showing a blank or partially filled form for adding a new resource, facility, or team.

task_completion.description: Verify the Team Name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field labeled 'Team Name', 'Resource Name', 'Organization', or 'Name' contains the exact text 'Kanawha Valley Regional HAZMAT Response Team'.

task_completion.description: Verify the address details are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fields for Street Address, City, State, and Zip Code contain '501 Virginia Street East', 'Charleston', 'WV', and '25301' respectively.

task_completion.description: Verify the contact name and phone number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fields for Contact Name (or similar) and Phone contain 'Captain Robert Hensley' and '304-357-0962'.

task_completion.description: Verify the notes are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Notes', 'Comments', or 'Description' text area contains the text starting with 'Level A certified. 24/7 availability. Covers Kanawha, Putnam, and Boone counties...'

task_completion.description: Verify the new record has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interface shows the record in a saved state (e.g., no longer in active text-edit mode, a 'Save' button was clicked, or the new team appears in a list/index view of resources).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible and being interacted with, rather than a terminal window executing backend database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry is happening inside the actual CAMEO Data Manager form fields, not in Notepad, Word, or a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface shows standard CAMEO Data Manager UI elements (menus, toolbars, FileMaker Pro database UI elements) consistent with the actual software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Charleston, West Virginia is a real city (county seat of Kanawha County and state capital) located at 501 Virginia Street East. The CAMEO Data Manager database format is typically .fmp12 (FileMaker Pro).
